object_added.role: Records official ACT DR6 baseline LCDM best-fit theory-source provenance and permits extraction-readiness only, not prediction-vector promotion.

NASA_LAMBDA_ACT_DR6_02_PSPIPE_BEST_FITS_.role: Official NASA LAMBDA page describing ACT DR6/P-ACT LCDM best-fit power spectra generated with CAMB v1.5.9.
NASA_LAMBDA_ACT_DR6_02_PSPIPE_BEST_FITS_.source_claim_recorded: LCDM best-fit spectra source; not an observed data-vector source.

NASA_LAMBDA_ACT_DR6_02_PSPIPE_BEST_FITS_.role: Official NASA LAMBDA download page for ACT DR6.02 Pspipe best-fit files.

NASA_LAMBDA_ACT_DR6_02_CHAINS_INFO.role: Official NASA LAMBDA ACT DR6 chain documentation describing Cobaya-produced chains and configuration outputs.

ACT_DR6_PARAMETERS_REPOSITORY.role: Official ACT Collaboration repository for ACT DR6 Cobaya parameters and run settings.

row_order_binding_against_act_dr6_orderi.required_mapping_rule: An extraction script must map official best-fit spectra columns into the exact ACT DR6 CMB-only SACC row order before constructing ACT_DR6_BASELINE_LCDM_PREDICTION_VECTOR.
row_order_binding_against_act_dr6_orderi.reason_not_closed_as_vector: The official best-fit source is a theory-source family; no final repository-native one-dimensional row-aligned vector has been extracted in this record.

basis: Official source class is LCDM best-fit power spectra generated with CAMB v1.5.9.
Prior shape-compatible local candidate was rejected as data-vector-derived and remains non-promoted.
Any future vector must be extracted from official best-fit/theory output and not from observed ACT DR6 data_vector.

does_not_prove: baseline LCDM prediction vector has been extracted
baseline LCDM prediction vector is row-aligned
baseline LCDM prediction vector is physically correct
ACT DR6 residual eigenspace empirical comparison has been run
dark matter phase transition is physically real
